16:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"BEAM Architecture Overview"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"BEAM (Biological-inspired Episodic-Associative Memory) is the core architecture powering Mnemosyne. It models human memory organization with four distinct tiers, each optimized for different retention and retrieval patterns."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"The Four Memory Tiers"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\ngraph TB\n  subgraph Input[\"Agent Input\"]\n      I1[Observation]\n      I2[Conversation]\n      I3[Tool Result]\n  end\n\n  subgraph BEAM[\"BEAM Memory System\"]\n      WM[Working Memory\n      Short-term, up to 10K entries\n      <100ms access]\n      EM[Episodic Memory\n      Long-term experiences\n      Hybrid retrieval]\n      SM[Semantic Memory\n      Structured facts\n      Subject-predicate-object triples]\n      SP[Scratchpad\n      Temporary workspace\n      Up to 1K entries]\n  end\n\n  I1 -->|remember| WM\n  I2 -->|remember| WM\n  I3 -->|remember| WM\n  WM -->|sleep consolidation| EM\n  EM -->|recall| Agent\n\n  style WM fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#0284c7\n  style EM fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#d97706\n  style SM fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a\n  style SP fill:#faf5ff,stroke:#9333ea\n"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The agent's immediate context window. Holds recent observations, conversation history, and active tool results. Fastest access (<100ms), limited capacity (up to 10,000 entries), and subject to eviction via sleep consolidation."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency"}],": Sub-100ms median"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity"}],": Up to 10,000 entries (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX_ITEMS"}],", default 10,000)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"TTL"}],": 24 hours (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_TTL_HOURS"}],", default 24)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Persistence"}],": Survives process restarts via SQLite"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Long-term storage for experiences, conversations, and events. Organized chronologically with rich metadata. Uses hybrid retrieval combining vector similarity and full-text search."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retention"}],": Permanent (until explicit deletion)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retrieval"}],": Hybrid (vector + FTS5) with fixed scoring weights"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Consolidation"}],": Promoted from Working Memory via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Structured knowledge stored as subject-predicate-object triples. Managed by the separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," class (not part of the main ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," class)."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Format"}],": Subject-predicate-object triples with confidence and validity timestamps"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Query"}],": Filter by subject, predicate, or object via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore.query()"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Access"}],": Separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," class or module-level ",["$","code",null,{"children":"add_triple()"}]," / ",["$","code",null,{"children":"query_triples()"}]," helpers"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$L3",": Flexible, no predefined ontology"]}],"\n"]}],"\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11"],["$L12"],"$L13"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"NyLeGfZBPFklBiPyv7L9J"}
3:["$","strong",null,{"children":"Schema"}]
4:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Scratchpad"}]
5:["$","p",null,{"children":"A temporary workspace for reasoning, planning, and intermediate computations. Analogous to human working memory's manipulation buffer."}]
6:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}]
7:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity"}],": Up to 1,000 entries (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SP_MAX"}],", default 1,000)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Use case"}],": Chain-of-thought, planning, scratch calculations"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"API"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_write()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_read()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_clear()"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Lifetime"}],": Session-bound"]}],"\n"]}]
8:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Data Flow"}]
9:["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\nsequenceDiagram\n  participant Agent\n  participant WM as Working Memory\n  participant SP as Scratchpad\n  participant EM as Episodic Memory\n  participant SM as Semantic Memory (TripleStore)\n\n  Agent->>WM: remember(content)\n  WM->>WM: store + index\n  Agent->>SP: scratchpad_write(thought)\n  SP->>SP: store\n  Agent->>EM: recall(query)\n  EM->>Agent: return results\n  Agent->>SM: add_triple(s, p, o)\n  SM->>SM: store triple\n  Agent->>SM: query_triples(s, p, o)\n  SM->>Agent: return triples\n"}]
a:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Sleep Consolidation"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Call ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," to run a consolidation cycle that:"]}]
c:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Select"}]," Working Memory entries older than TTL/2 (12 hours by default)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Group"}]," candidates by source"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarize"}]," each group via LLM or AAAK text substitution"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promote"}]," summaries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evict"}]," the original Working Memory entries"]}],"\n"]}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Sleep is triggered explicitly — it does not run automatically on a timer."}]
e:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Design Philosophy"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's architecture prioritizes:"}]
10:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Locality"}],": All data in SQLite — no network calls for retrieval"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transparency"}],": Every operation is inspectable and debuggable"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Efficiency"}],": Sub-100ms retrieval for typical workloads"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Flexibility"}],": Works standalone or as a Hermes plugin"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Privacy"}],": No data leaves your machine by default"]}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L14",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Comparison with Vector-Only Stores"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Unlike pure vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate), Mnemosyne combines dense embeddings with structured storage, full-text search, and temporal relationships. This hybrid approach delivers more precise retrieval for agent use cases where exact facts matter as much as semantic similarity."}]}]]}]]}]}]
12:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/03grble4o35rv.js","async":true}]
